functions.name: default
functions.description: Returns a default value if the input is empty.

functions.name: empty
functions.description: True if value is the zero value for its type (0, "", nil, empty list/map).

functions.name: coalesce
functions.description: Returns the first non-empty argument.

functions.name: ternary
functions.signature: ternary(ifTrue any, ifFalse any, test bool) any
functions.description: Branch on a boolean. Returns ifTrue when test is true, else ifFalse.

functions.name: toYaml
functions.description: Serializes a value to YAML.

functions.name: fromYaml
functions.description: Parses a YAML string into a map.

functions.name: toJson
functions.description: Serializes a value to compact JSON.

functions.name: fromJson
functions.description: Parses a JSON string.

functions.name: b64enc
functions.description: Base64-encodes a string.

functions.name: b64dec
functions.description: Base64-decodes a string.

functions.name: quote
functions.description: Wraps a value in double quotes.

functions.name: printf
functions.description: Go-style formatted string.

functions.name: replace
functions.signature: replace(old string, new string, value string) string
functions.description: Replaces all occurrences of old with new in value.

functions.name: hasPrefix
functions.description: True if value starts with prefix.

functions.name: hasSuffix
functions.description: True if value ends with suffix.

functions.name: contains
functions.description: True if value contains substr.

functions.name: split
functions.description: Splits value on sep, returns map keyed _0, _1, ...

functions.name: list
functions.description: Creates a list from the given items.

functions.name: dict
functions.description: Creates a map from alternating key/value pairs.

functions.name: get
functions.description: Returns a value from a map by key.

functions.name: set
functions.signature: set(dict map[string]any, key string, value any) map[string]any
functions.description: Sets a key in a map and returns the map.

functions.name: merge
functions.description: Merges src maps into dst (dst wins on conflict).

functions.name: index
functions.description: Indexes into a list or map, supports nested access.

functions.name: len
functions.description: Length of a string, list, or map.

functions.name: include
functions.description: Renders a named template and returns its output as a string.

functions.name: required
functions.description: Fails the render with message if value is empty.

functions.name: tpl
functions.description: Renders a string as a Go template within the given data context.

functions.name: lookup
functions.signature: lookup(apiVersion string, kind string, namespace string, name string) map[string]any

returns.description: Resource as a map, or empty map if not found.

functions.description: Looks up a live Kubernetes resource at render time. In Helm context, requires cluster access.

functions.name: toString
functions.description: Converts a value to its string representation.

functions.name: toInt
functions.description: Converts a value to an integer.

contextValues.name: .Release.Name
contextValues.description: The release name.

contextValues.name: .Release.Namespace
contextValues.description: The namespace the release is being installed into.

contextValues.name: .Release.IsUpgrade
contextValues.description: True if the current operation is an upgrade or rollback.

contextValues.name: .Release.IsInstall
contextValues.description: True if the current operation is an install.

contextValues.name: .Release.Revision
contextValues.description: Revision number of this release. 1 on first install, increments per upgrade and rollback.

contextValues.name: .Release.Service
contextValues.description: The service performing the release. Always 'Helm'.

contextValues.name: .Chart.Name
contextValues.description: Name from the chart's Chart.yaml.

contextValues.name: .Chart.Version
contextValues.description: Version from the chart's Chart.yaml.

contextValues.name: .Chart.AppVersion
contextValues.description: appVersion from the chart's Chart.yaml.

contextValues.name: .Chart.Description
contextValues.description: description from the chart's Chart.yaml.

contextValues.name: .Chart.Type
contextValues.description: type from the chart's Chart.yaml (application or library).

contextValues.name: .Chart.Annotations
contextValues.description: Annotations from the chart's Chart.yaml.

contextValues.name: .Chart.Dependencies
contextValues.description: Dependencies declared in the chart's Chart.yaml.

contextValues.name: .Files.Get
contextValues.description: Function to get file contents as a string by path inside the chart.

contextValues.name: .Files.GetBytes
contextValues.description: Function to get file contents as []byte.

contextValues.name: .Files.Glob
contextValues.description: Returns a Files object matching pattern.

contextValues.name: .Files.Lines
contextValues.description: Reads a file and returns its lines.

contextValues.name: .Files.AsConfig
contextValues.description: Returns the contents of all files as a YAML map suitable for ConfigMap.data.

contextValues.name: .Files.AsSecrets
contextValues.description: Returns the contents of all files as base64-encoded YAML map suitable for Secret.data.

contextValues.name: .Capabilities.KubeVersion
contextValues.description: Kubernetes version info for the target cluster.

contextValues.name: .Capabilities.KubeVersion.Version
contextValues.description: Full Kubernetes version string, e.g. v1.27.3.

contextValues.name: .Capabilities.KubeVersion.Major
contextValues.description: Kubernetes major version.

contextValues.name: .Capabilities.KubeVersion.Minor
contextValues.description: Kubernetes minor version.

contextValues.name: .Capabilities.APIVersions
contextValues.description: Set of API versions known by the target cluster.

contextValues.name: .Capabilities.HelmVersion
contextValues.description: Helm version info.

contextValues.name: .Template.Name
contextValues.description: Path of the current template, e.g. mychart/templates/mytemplate.yaml.

contextValues.name: .Template.BasePath
contextValues.description: Base path of the current chart's templates directory.
